title: 1 step DFU - Language update when only CC has update
scenario: Language change via 1-step DFU succeeds when only Charge Case has a firmware update on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the Osprey (Voyager Free 60+) device is connected and only the Charge Case (CC) has a firmware update available (Earbuds are already on the latest version).
3. Navigate to: Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Language.
4. Select a new language from the available options.
5. Tap "Update Now" on the Language Change prompt.
6. Observe the Software Update screen is displayed, showing the Charge Case firmware update progress.
7. Wait for the language change DFU to complete.
8. Verify the DFU finishes successfully and the Charge Case is now on the latest firmware version.
9. On the Charge Case, navigate through the touch screen menus to confirm the selected language is applied correctly.
expected: The language change DFU completes successfully. The Charge Case is updated to the latest firmware. The Charge Case touch screen menus display the newly selected language.
